pr.title: Connexion Google + sync Drive privé (#1)
pr.body:
* Add Google OAuth login and Drive sync for private data storage

Only the authorized Google account can access the app. All data is
stored in Google Drive appDataFolder (private, not visible in Drive UI)
and synced automatically after every change.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BrHq7gfuuFP1wvbK8RHB72

* Configure Google OAuth client ID and authorized email

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BrHq7gfuuFP1wvbK8RHB72

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: Lindns118
